revisions.*: Because "rvslots" was not specified, a legacy format has been used for the output. This format is deprecated, and in the future the new format will always be used.

'''6-3-300

Acronym: TEG

A device used to convert heat into electric energy. It consists of a battery of thermocouples, i.e. a thermopile.

{{IALAFooter}}

{{languages|Thermoelectric generator}}
